mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reminder_schedule (task_id, user_id, scheduled_at, status, attempt_count, max_attempts, idempotency_key, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{userId}, #{scheduledAt}, #{status}, #{attemptCount}, #{maxAttempts}, #{idempotencyKey}, NOW(3), NOW(3))
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id AS taskId, user_id AS userId, scheduled_at AS scheduledAt, status, attempt_count AS attemptCount, max_attempts AS maxAttempts, last_attempt_at AS lastAttemptAt, sent_at AS sentAt, idempotency_key AS idempotencyKey, fail_reason AS failReason, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reminder_schedule WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC

SELECT id, task_id AS taskId, user_id AS userId, scheduled_at AS scheduledAt, status, attempt_count AS attemptCount, max_attempts AS maxAttempts, last_attempt_at AS lastAttemptAt, sent_at AS sentAt, idempotency_key AS idempotencyKey, fail_reason AS failReason, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reminder_schedule WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, task_id AS taskId, user_id AS userId, scheduled_at AS scheduledAt, status, attempt_count AS attemptCount, max_attempts AS maxAttempts, last_attempt_at AS lastAttemptAt, sent_at AS sentAt, idempotency_key AS idempotencyKey, fail_reason AS failReason, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reminder_schedule WHERE status = 1 AND scheduled_at <= #{now} ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, task_id AS taskId, user_id AS userId, scheduled_at AS scheduledAt, status, attempt_count AS attemptCount, max_attempts AS maxAttempts, last_attempt_at AS lastAttemptAt, sent_at AS sentAt, idempotency_key AS idempotencyKey, fail_reason AS failReason, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reminder_schedule WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND scheduled_at >= #{start} AND scheduled_at < #{end} ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC

SELECT id, task_id AS taskId, user_id AS userId, scheduled_at AS scheduledAt, status, attempt_count AS attemptCount, max_attempts AS maxAttempts, last_attempt_at AS lastAttemptAt, sent_at AS sentAt, idempotency_key AS idempotencyKey, fail_reason AS failReason, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reminder_schedule WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND DATE(scheduled_at) = #{date} ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC

SELECT s.id, s.task_id AS taskId, s.user_id AS userId, s.scheduled_at AS scheduledAt, s.status, s.attempt_count AS attemptCount, s.max_attempts AS maxAttempts, s.last_attempt_at AS lastAttemptAt, s.sent_at AS sentAt, s.idempotency_key AS idempotencyKey, s.fail_reason AS failReason, s.created_at AS createdAt, s.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reminder_schedule s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(s.scheduled_at) = #{date} AND s.status != 5 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM review_record r WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.schedule_id = s.id ) ORDER BY s.scheduled_at ASC

SELECT id, task_id AS taskId, user_id AS userId, scheduled_at AS scheduledAt, status, attempt_count AS attemptCount, max_attempts AS maxAttempts, last_attempt_at AS lastAttemptAt, sent_at AS sentAt, idempotency_key AS idempotencyKey, fail_reason AS failReason, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reminder_schedule WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != 5 AND DATE(scheduled_at) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(scheduled_at) <= #{endDate} ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC

SELECT id, task_id AS taskId, user_id AS userId, scheduled_at AS scheduledAt, status, attempt_count AS attemptCount, max_attempts AS maxAttempts, last_attempt_at AS lastAttemptAt, sent_at AS sentAt, idempotency_key AS idempotencyKey, fail_reason AS failReason, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reminder_schedule WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE reminder_schedule SET status = 2, last_attempt_at = NOW(3), updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE reminder_schedule SET status = 3, sent_at = NOW(3), updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reminder_schedule SET status = 3, sent_at = NOW(3), updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE reminder_schedule SET status = #{status}, attempt_count = attempt_count + 1, fail_reason = #{failReason}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reminder_schedule SET status = 5, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status IN (1, 4)
UPDATE reminder_schedule SET scheduled_at = #{scheduledAt}, status = 1, sent_at = NULL, last_attempt_at = NULL, fail_reason = NULL, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
